title: 25x Large Punch Balloons for Kids Ideal Party Bag Fillers - 12 Inch Large Size - Assorted Colours - Fun ChildrenтАЩs Party Ideas - Thick & Strong - Easy to Inflate
features: Create Amazing Party Bags - Kids can play rough with our premium quality, heavy duty punching balloons. They have been designed to withstand the most energetic of play times at any event. Making them perfect punch balloons for party bags. (Crafted from 8g Strong Latex)

Kids Will Love Them - Add some grains of rice to our punch balloons for kids for extra noise & fun. They will bring laughter and smiles to all big kids & little kids. Perfect for children's parties, birthday parties, Halloween, Christmas, New Year and many other events.

Easy To Inflate - Each pack contains 25 multicoloured balloons including purple, blue, yellow, orange, red, green and pink punch balloons. Our large balloons are all super easy to inflate & solid in colour with no unwanted or inconsistent prints, making them perfect for a variety of events.

A Big Hit At Parties - The high quality elastic bands attached to our inflatable punch balloons for kids are reassuringly robust and won't easily break whilst using them, due to their high strength and elasticity. They will arrive securely attached to the balloons, so just blow up and go!
Fantastic Party Pack - Receive 25 large punch balloons, the perfect party bag fillers for kids birthday parties and more! Add our punch ballons to your little ones party for guaranteed fun
